tasks.label: build
tasks.command: mkdir -p build && cd build && cmake .. && make -j

tasks.label: build test
tasks.command: mkdir -p build && cd build && cmake -DPLANNER_ENABLE_TESTS=ON -DPLANNER_ENABLE_EXAMPLES=OFF .. && make -j planner_test

tasks.label: build examples
tasks.command: mkdir -p build && cd build && cmake -DPLANNER_ENABLE_TESTS=OFF -DPLANNER_ENABLE_EXAMPLES=ON .. && make -j planner_example_simple planner_example_advanced

tasks.label: build all
tasks.command: mkdir -p build && cd build && cmake -DPLANNER_ENABLE_TESTS=ON -DPLANNER_ENABLE_EXAMPLES=ON .. && make -j
